channel.title: Akshat Gada — Writing
channel.description: Notes on agentic payments, agent swarms, and the machine-payable web — what I'm building, and what I think about it.

item.title: One big brain is the wrong bet
item.description: Everyone's racing to build a single, enormous mind. The most interesting AI of the last two years came from the opposite move — throw a lot of small agents in a room and let them sort it out. On swarms, emergence (Vicsek, Boids, OpenAI hide-and-seek, Generative Agents, Project Sid), and why the swarm needs real payments.
